windows.transcript: refrigerated chamber. The sprinklers shoot the wax upwards into the cold air. Like falling precipitation
windows.old_description: Wax filling moulds on the conveyor.
windows.embed_text_v2: spraying liquid paraffin wax upward in a refrigerated factory chamber so it rains down like snow, congealing into white wax flakes and powder piling on rails and floor; industrial candle wax production, pale white
windows.summary_v2: In a refrigerated factory chamber, sprinklers shoot liquid wax upward so it falls like snow and congeals into white wax flakes that pile up below.

tags_v2.action: spraying wax into cold air to solidify

seconds_v2.desc: Inside a refrigerated factory chamber, a fine spray of pale wax droplets falls like a curtain past a horizontal rail studded with rounded wax pellets.
The wax mist continues raining downward; the rail of accumulated round wax beads runs across the lower frame, slightly blurred from camera motion.
Wider view of the chilled chamber as streaks of wax precipitation pour straight down, dusting a long lower ledge white with congealing wax.
The wax keeps falling in vertical streaks; the floor ledge below is coated in a thickening layer of white wax granules.
Continued shower of wax flakes drifting down through the cold air onto the frosted lower rail and floor.
Camera shifts to the spray machinery: a long horizontal manifold/brush rail flings wax, with a heaped pile of white wax powder mounding below it.
Same machinery view; wax continues spraying off the rail and building up the snowy white mound of solidified wax flakes beneath.
The wax spray and accumulating white powder pile persist; a Discovery channel watermark sits in the lower-right corner.

windows.transcript: One after another, the frames dip the wicks into a tank of clear paraffin. As the frames rise from the tank,
windows.old_description: Tapers built up by repeated machine dips.
windows.embed_text_v2: dipping rows of hanging wicks into a tank of clear molten paraffin and raising the frame to build taper candles layer by layer; industrial dipped candle making, pale wax strands dripping, dark wax vat
windows.summary_v2: In a factory, frames repeatedly dip rows of hanging wicks into a tank of clear paraffin and raise them, building up the wax taper candles layer by layer.

tags_v2.action: dipping wicks into paraffin tank to build candles

seconds_v2.desc: In a factory, dozens of pale wax-coated wicks hang in dense rows from an overhead frame, dripping down toward a dark dipping tank of clear paraffin below.
A rectangular grid frame holding many parallel wicks rises, the long strands of wax-built candles dangling and dripping above the tank.
The grid frame of dipped wicks lifts higher out of the tank, rows of thickening taper candles streaming molten wax.
The frame continues rising; the grid of partly built candles clears the tank, wax running off their tips back into the vat.
Side view of the long racks of hanging dipped candles, pale wax strands packed tightly as the frame moves over the tank.
The frame lowers again, the rows of wax-coated wicks descending back toward the dark paraffin bath.
The grid of wicks dips down toward the tank surface, fresh wax beginning to coat the hanging candles as wax pools below.
The dipped candles hang dripping over the tank, a fresh layer of paraffin built up; a faint Discovery watermark sits lower-right.

windows.transcript: just a staple of religion, ritual or romance, candles today are a hot decorative item.
windows.old_description: Closing shot of the lit finished candles.
windows.embed_text_v2: Burning decorative pillar and taper candles in church candle stand and home displays, red cream gold ivory pillars lit with flickering flames, Discovery Channel watermark, finished-candle decor b-roll.
windows.summary_v2: Decor footage of arrays of lit taper and pillar candles in church-style racks and home settings, illustrating candles as decorative items.

tags_v2.setting: church candle rack and home interior

seconds_v2.desc: Many tall white taper candles arranged in dense church-like rack, unlit, vintage-stock footage colouring.
Same tapers, now most are lit with warm flickering flames creating a glow across the rows.
Cut to home decor scene: assorted red and ivory taper and pillar candles lit on a mantel/shelf with warm ambient light; small Discovery Channel watermark bottom-right.
Soft-focus arrangement of lit red and cream pillar candles with multiple flames in a cozy interior.
Cluster of lit pillar candles in red, cream, gold and amber colours grouped together with a single floating tealight in the foreground.
Similar cluster of lit pillar candles, Discovery Channel logo persistent bottom-right.
Continued shot of the lit decorative pillar candle arrangement burning steadily on a tabletop.
